en: He said you had a room.
Go in there and wait, quietly.
Don't make a sound or I'll kill you.
I was actually having the first good idea I've had for a decade when he rang on the doorbell.
ko: 사실 네가 초인종을 눌렀을 때, 10년 만에 처음으로 좋은 아이디어가 떠올랐어.

en: But now it's gone. You little shit.
How's your dad? Weird cock, I always thought.
Yeah, I never really liked him, actually. Your mum still looked like Andy Warhol.
ko: 응, 사실 그를 별로 좋아하지 않았어.

en: What? That, by the way, is my wife.
